prompt:
Using the attached design reference, produce a CLEAN BACKGROUND ART PLATE version of the exact same scene.

REMOVE every UX element:
- the 'PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS' wordmark at the top-left
- the nav items 'APPROACH SERVICES ABOUT CONTACT' at the top-right
- the entire stacked headline 'Built. Not pitched. Not promised.'
- the persimmon orange underline beneath the headline
- the meta line 'AN AI SOLUTIONS PRACTICE / EST. 2026'
- the ghost 'Start a Conversation' button at the lower-right
- the bottom-left index marker 'INDEX / 01 - PRACTICE'
- any other text, button, line, or chrome

KEEP, EXACTLY AS THEY ARE:
- the photograph itself: the hand and forearm in rolled-cuff white shirt holding a black ballpoint pen mid-motion over a marked-up printed A4 spreadsheet, the heavy wooden desk, the closed matte-black 14-inch laptop, the small ceramic mug of black coffee, the stack of two leather-bound notebooks, the dark navy plaster wall behind
- the lighting (late golden hour from camera-left), camera angle, depth of field, film grain, color grade, aspect ratio
- the slight vignette in the upper-right corner

The output must look like the empty stage the original UX was sitting on - the photograph taken BEFORE any text was ever placed.

FORBID: any text anywhere in the image, any logo, any UI overlay, any persimmon orange or chromatic accent, any added object, any added person.
